name: sTraffic co,.Ltd.
summary: sTraffic co,.Ltd. provides urban mobility solutions and system integrators worldwide. It offers e-payment solutions comprising of electronic toll collection system, automatic fare collection, settlement and clearing system, e-vehicle charging, and parking system solutions. The company provides ground transportation solutions, such as intelligent transport system, vertical platform screen door, train signaling and control system, and railroad telecommunication system solutions. In addition, it offers smart pass, flight information management system, flight information display system, and system wide information management solutions, as well as multi-lane free flow tolling, electronic interlocking, track side functional module, front end processing operation level, and electric switch machine system solutions. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Seongnam-si, South Korea.
